overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player character navigates a futuristic urban environment with towering skyscrapers, neon advertisements, elevated highways, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic. The aesthetic features high-contrast neon lighting against dark buildings with a slightly hazy atmospheric perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with glass canopy walkways

events.description: camera lowers from looking up at skyscrapers to forward walking position
turns right to align with sidewalk direction and continues walking

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk while observing the towering skyscrapers and neon signs overhead, adjusting direction to follow the pedestrian path

notable_agents.action: black luxury car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: transparent glass-enclosed pedestrian bridge connecting buildings overhead with reflective surfaces
massive futuristic skyscraper with dark glass facade rising vertically above the street
large holographic advertisement display with glowing cyan and purple neon colors
tall palm tree lining the street against the backdrop of tall buildings
multi-level highway structure with vehicles visible on the upper decks

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view looking up at towering skyscrapers and glass-enclosed walkways in a futuristic plaza. The camera lowers to walking height and turns to follow a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees. Neon holographic billboards glow against the afternoon sky as the character walks past moderate pedestrian traffic and occasional vehicles on the adjacent multi-lane street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing other pedestrians and observing the neon advertisements on the building facades

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and shorts walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large rectangular neon sign with red and white lettering advertising CIRKUS on the building facade
building wall covered with multiple glowing neon advertisements and digital screens
street sign post displaying speed limit of 40 with yellow border

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the shadow of an elevated highway, the scene features a narrower urban canyon with the sky mostly blocked by overhead structures. The right side of the street is lined with buildings covered in bright neon billboards including a prominent CIRKUS sign. Pedestrians walk in both directions along the concrete sidewalk while moderate traffic flows on the street to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass beneath highway with artificial neon lighting

events.description: enters the deep shadow of the overpass, natural light fades and artificial neon lighting becomes dominant
steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street between moving vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking under the dark overpass structure and then crossing the street, navigating between moving cars

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past as ego crosses the street

entered.detail: dark concrete underside of the highway overpass with massive support pillars
vertical traffic signal pole with multiple colored lights and digital displays
concrete wall covered with colorful graffiti tags and street art
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The environment becomes significantly darker as the character enters the shadow of a massive highway overpass. Artificial neon lights illuminate the concrete pillars and graffiti-covered walls. The character crosses the multi-lane street using the crosswalk, navigating between moving vehicles including a red sports car, while the enclosed space creates an urban canyon effect with no visible sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with food vendor stall and arcade machines

events.description: arrives at food vendor plaza with purple neon lighting and arcade machines visible on the right

agents.ego_description: walking past the food vendor stall with purple neon lighting and continuing along the sidewalk near arcade machines

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing at the stall with glowing purple neon accents

entered.detail: futuristic food cart with bright purple neon lights and illuminated signage
row of glowing arcade game cabinets with colorful screens and neon trim
large modern entrance to building with glass doors and overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark underpass, the scene opens to a street corner featuring a distinctive food vendor stall bathed in purple neon light. To the right, a row of glowing arcade machines lines the sidewalk. The character walks past moderate pedestrian traffic and the vendor area, with the environment transitioning from the enclosed darkness of the overpass to a more open urban street with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open futuristic plaza into the oppressive shadows of an urban underpass before emerging back into a neon-lit street corner. It begins by looking up at towering skyscrapers and glass walkways before the camera lowers to follow a palm-lined sidewalk beneath glowing holographic billboards. As the character moves forward, the open sky is gradually blocked by the heavy concrete of an elevated highway, shifting the environment into a narrow urban canyon dominated by bright neon signs and the prominent CIRKUS advertisement. The scene then plunges into deeper darkness beneath a massive overpass, where artificial lights illuminate graffiti-covered pillars as the camera navigates a crosswalk between moving vehicles. Finally, the view emerges from the enclosed gloom into a more open street, passing a purple-lit food vendor and a row of glowing arcade machines.
